original_image_tags: A scanned manila document jacket or folder, oriented vertically. The paper is aged and yellow-orange. At the top right, there is a single handwritten reference number in black ink. At the top center, a single hole punch is visible. Near the bottom edge, there are two pairs of hole punches, four holes in total, spaced for a standard fastener.

elements.description: Yellowed paper envelope flap with a handwritten alphanumeric code '62-83894-177' at the top center and five black hole-punch circles at the bottom.

judge.reason: Description A states there are four hole punches in two pairs, while Description B states there are five hole punches, which is a direct contradiction on object count.
